case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,370.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
